ead.archdesc:

English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University and Ithaca views and guidebooks
no primary creator
Perkins, Frank C. (Frank Clinton), 1867- (Title of work: Cornell University, her general and technical courses..)
Thurber, Charles H. (Charles Herbert), 1864-1938. (Title of work: In and out of Ithaca..)
Sheldon, Seth L. (Title of work: Photographic gems..)
Business Men\'s Association of Ithaca (N.Y.) (Title of work: Some suggestions about Ithaca and its business resources..)
Cornell University (Title of work: Campus of Cornell University..)
Albertype Co (Title of work: Cornell University photo-gravures..)
Cornell Co-Operative Society (Title of work: Familiar views at Cornell University..)
Student Supply Store (Ithaca, N.Y.) (Title of work: Cornell book..)
4059
26 volumes.
4 items.
1873-1982. Printed material. Guidebooks and books of views of Cornell University and Ithaca, N.Y. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 2 ======= 2 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 5348046
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Katie Guttman
Date completed:
December 2017
EAD encoding:
Fredrika Loew, December 2017
Date modified:
Fredrika Loew, October 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Guidebooks and books of views of Cornell University and Ithaca, N.Y.
Cite As:
Cornell University and Ithaca Views and Guidebooks, #4059. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Postcards, Photogravures. Travel guidebooks. Ithaca (N.Y.) -- Guidebooks. Ithaca (N.Y.) -- Pictorial works. Galvanometer. Rowing. Cornell University -- : Pictorial works. Cornell University -- : Guidebooks. Cornell University -- : History. Cornell University -- : Faculty. Cornell University -- : Students. Cornell University -- : Athletics. Sibley College of Mechanical Engineering and Mechanic Arts -- : Pictorial works. New York State College of Agriculture -- : Pictorial works.

Scope and Contents
Contains 30 photograveurs, plus one additional one of Taughannock Falls. Cover has letters HBY or MBY printed under the word Cornell.Cornell University: Photo-GravuresPublisher- Dudley F. Finch189531Cornell University: Photo-GravuresPublisher- Student Supply Store Inc.Undated32Loose Book Pages: PhotosUndated32Glimpses of Ithaca and Cornell: Book of PostcardsUndated33Cornell in Pictures1941-12-1633
Scope and Contents
Gift of Estate of Walter L. Todd Class 1909Cornell191936
Scope and Contents
Colorized photogravures of Cornell and Ithaca area including several waterfalls. Also includes a page that is a 1919 calendar.Framed photograph University and groundsCirca 18701Framed pages from Harper's Weekly showing campus and faculty1873-06-211East View of Ithaca, Tompkins County, NY18362
Scope and Contents
ReproductionSketches1880-19104
Scope and Contents
Two books of compiled cyanotypes. Not commercial volumes.Cornell University photosUndated3
Scope and Contents
Soft cover, photographs and descriptions by Arthur L. Smith and associates of University photographs.
